name: safecoastseafoods.com
message: [AI generated] Safecoast Seafoods is a premium seafood sourcing and distribution company. They are focused on delivering the highest quality fresh and frozen seafood to various markets. They partner with sustainable fisheries worldwide, ensuring they offer a wide variety of species. Their services include wholesale distribution, home delivery and even private labeling, meeting the needs of restaurants, markets, and individual consumers alike.
